Gap Description: No documentation on native CI/CD integrations such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Bitbucket Pipelines for automated feedback submission.
Absence of guides on WCAG compliance testing and accessibility audits within zipBoard, limiting adoption by accessibility‑focused enterprises.
Limited troubleshooting steps for ad‑blocker or browser extension conflicts that prevent the zipBoard extension from loading or recording feedback.
Insufficient detail on enterprise‑grade security controls such as SAML SSO configuration, IP whitelisting, and data residency options.
Lack of comprehensive webhook reference and automation examples for triggering zipBoard actions from external workflows.
